name: altium-copilot
description: AI copilot for Altium Designer (Windows only). Reads live schematics from a running Altium instance — trace nets, inspect components, switch variants, and run structured design reviews, all from Claude. Requires Altium Designer installed and running on Windows.

tools.name: detect_altium_project
tools.description: Detect whether Altium Designer is running, which project is currently open, and list previously loaded projects from the local registry. Always call this first to orient Claude before loading a project.

tools.name: set_project_dir
tools.description: Load an Altium project from disk given its folder path. Parses the .PrjPcb file, reads all schematic sheets, and generates a Protel netlist by automating Altium's export. Required before calling any other tool. Altium Designer must be running with the target project open.

tools.name: refresh_netlist
tools.description: Regenerate the netlist after the user saves schematic changes in Altium. Only call when the user confirms they have saved — do not call speculatively.

tools.name: query_net
tools.description: Find nets by name and return every component pin connected to them. Accepts a case-insensitive regex for discovery (e.g. 'UART' finds all UART nets, 'GND' finds GND/AGND/DGND). If the pattern contains regex metacharacters and is invalid (e.g. +5V, +3V3, VIN[0]), falls back to exact case-insensitive match automatically. High-fanout nets like power rails are flagged and sampled. Use this to discover net names or trace a specific net across sheets.

tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Get full detail for a component by reference designator (e.g. U1, R14). Returns the MPN, value, DNP status, and every pin with its connected net.

tools.name: search_components
tools.description: Search components using a regex pattern against refdes, MPN, or description. Results are grouped by MPN with per-group counts — useful for finding all instances of a part or all components matching a description.

tools.name: get_sheet_context
tools.description: Get all components on a schematic sheet with their pin-to-net connections and cross-sheet neighbors. Results are paginated — if has_more is true, call again with the next offset. Pass a sheet name or omit to use the currently active sheet in Altium.

tools.name: list_variants
tools.description: List all project variants and their DNP (Do Not Populate) component lists. Returns variant names and which components are excluded in each.

tools.name: set_active_variant
tools.description: Switch the active variant by name. DNP annotations update immediately and all subsequent tool calls reflect the new variant's populated/excluded components.

tools.name: schematic_review
tools.description: Start a structured 3-phase schematic review: power integrity, signal integrity, and BOM/variant sanity. Automatically triggered when the user asks Claude to review the schematic.

tools.name: brainstorm_circuits
tools.description: Start a structured 5-phase circuit brainstorming session: requirements, topology options, component selection, tradeoffs, and next steps. Automatically triggered when the user asks Claude to brainstorm a circuit.

tools.name: package_for_xfn
tools.description: Export the current schematic project to a portable SQLite .db snapshot that cross-functional team members (firmware, mechanical, test, reliability) can query with pcb-copilot. Only call when the user explicitly asks to package or export the project for sharing.
